steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: Left of the blank: Dr. Rubén G. is a noun phrase serving as the subject. Right of the blank: studies historical locations... is the start of the verb phrase.

steps.title: Apply the rule and choose
steps.content: The rule is that a subject and verb within the same clause are not separated by punctuation. B is correct—no punctuation allows the subject and verb to remain properly connected. Choices A, C, and D violate this by inserting punctuation (semicolon, comma, or colon) where none is permitted. This matches choice B — B is correct.
